methods.name: CT-ICP+NDT-KF
methods.note: Hybrid keyframe correction: CT-ICP no-GT odometry is the base trajectory; NDT T1 correction is attempted every 5 frames and accepted only when correction delta is <= 0.5m / 0.35rad. accepted=18/21, rejected=3, finite-prior fallbacks=0, CT-ICP prior ATE=8.381m. Runtime is CT-ICP+NDT combined.
